title: System for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials
abstract: The present invention is a system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials which links all the employees, employers, educational institutions and certifying institutes, verification agencies and police departments who contribute to the system. Employees upload their basic, educational and employment details from which the basic details are verified from the information obtained from the Government database, educational details are verified from the data obtained from the institute through which the employee has obtained education and employment details are verified from the data obtained from employers. They can also get certified copies of their testimonials whenever required. The details which aren't verified are sent to verification agencies for verification Police department uploads the data of all the criminals which gets stored in the central server to be synchronized with the employee data. Thus the system provides complete verified information of all employees.
claims:
Claims I claim, 1. System for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials which has a database containing the details of all the employees including but not limited to their educational qualifications, their work experience and their personal details all of which is verified through authentic sources wherein employees enter their basic data as well as their educational details, which get verified through the corresponding institute, and work details, which get verified through the corresponding employers; employers gain access to and view the verified details of their prospective employees as well as update the data of their current employees; educational institutions and certifying institutes upload the data of all their previous and current students which is updated regularly and provide the format of various certificates issued by them so that the system can provide certified copies of these testimonials to employees whenever required; verifying agencies, who are given the work of verifying unverified data and upload their report after completing the verification process; and police stations, who upload and update the data of all the fraudsters and criminals who have performed illegal activities which gets synchronized with the employee data. 2. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 1 wherein employees register with the system by giving their basic details, which are verified by the system, and by creating a login ID which is password protected to interact with the system following which they are indexed in the system with one or more of their permanent data like their Permanent Account number, Aadhar card number, Passport number, citizenship number and others such that 

 the employee's basic and personal details are verified by the details present in these permanent data which are linked with the system. 3. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 2 wherein the employee, upon registration, adds his educational qualifications and academic achievements following which: (a) the data is immediately verified if the educational institutions are linked with the system by synchronizing the data with the data obtained from educational institutions; (b) the data is marked as unverified if the educational institutions haven't uploaded their students' academic data and the institutions are requested to upload their data so that it can be used for verification; (c) the data is marked as unverified if the educational institutions still don't upload their data and it is sent to an approved verification agency for verification with prior consent of the employee who agrees to pay for the verification process and on receiving the report of verification from the verifying agency, the data is marked as verified; or (d) the data remains as unverified if the employee doesn't agree for external verification and this data gets verified whenever in future the educational institution links with the system. 4. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 3 wherein the employee, after adding his educational details, adds his work experience details including his date of joining, position held, salary structure, incentives, achievements, increments, date of relieving from previous employments and other details following which: 

 (a) the data is immediately verified if the employer is linked with the system by synchronizing the data with the data obtained from the employer; (b) the data is marked as unverified if the employer hasn't uploaded his previous and present employees data and the employer is requested to upload his data so that it can be used for verification; (c) the data is marked as unverified if the employer still doesn't upload his data and it is sent to an approved verification agency for verification with prior consent of the employee who agrees to pay for the verification process and on receiving the report of verification from the verifying agency, the data is marked as verified; or (d) the data remains as unverified if the employee doesn't agree for external verification and this data gets verified whenever in future the employer links with the system. â â 5. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claims 3 and 4 wherein the educational details and the work experience details added by the employee are supplemented with his certificates which are uploaded and the data gets saved in a non-editable mode. 6. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 3 and 4 wherein under circumstances namely, if the synchronized data is found erroneous by the employee, if some mismatch of data is detected during the synchronization due to which the details remain unverified, if some erroneous data entered by the educational institute or employer is detected by the employee or if a change is required in the basic details of the employee, the employee informs the back end team of the system regarding the changes to be made who verify the data to be changed and if the employees request is found authentic, they change it. 7. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 5 wherein after the uploading of the complete data of the employees, the system gives a score to all employees based on the comments provided by his employers, his academic achievements, his stability, integrity, experience, sincerity, dedication and other such factors which aids a new employer in identifying and employing the right candidate. 8. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 7 wherein the employer records with the system, the details of frauds, illegal activities or malpractices committed by any employee during his work tenure which may or may not be registered with the police station so that such activities get known to a new employer before recruiting an employee. 9. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 1 wherein employers register with the system by giving their basic details, which are verified by the system, and by creating a login ID which is password protected to interact with the system following which they are indexed in the system with one or more of their permanent data like their Permanent Account number or other such identification number such that the employer's basic details are verified by the details present in these permanent data which are linked with the system. 10. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 9 wherein after registering with the system, the employers upload and update their previous and current employees data in the format provided by the system which gets stored with the system such that when any previous 

 employee of the employer registers with the system, the stored data is used for synchronizing and verifying his data. 1 1. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 10 wherein the employer periodically updates the data of his current employees including but not limited to the change of position of employees in the company, their increment, their trainings, achievements, salary structure, perks enjoyed along with the details of frauds, illegal activities or malpractices if any conducted by any of the employees, as well as immediately updates when an employee gets relieved from his job giving him a no objection and no due certificate which may contain the mention of the illegal activiies following which he loses his authority to access and update the relieved employee's data. 12. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 1 1 wherein when an employer finalizes a candidate for recruitment with him, he asks the prospective employee for his basic details for verification with the system following which he can access and download the prospective employee's data which has verified and unverified information of the prospective employee providing the employer with authentic information of his prospective employee's details including but not limited to his educational qualification, work experience, his position occupied and salary drawn in his previous job, his certificates and credentials from his previous employers as well as the score provided to the employee by the system which helps in the decision making process of the employer to employ the candidate. 13. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 12 wherein when an employee gets a new job he confirms a link sent by the new employer following which the new employer gains access to the employee's data, can view his previous details in a non-editable mode and can update the employee's present status and present employment details at regular intervals. 14. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 1 wherein educational institutions and certifying institutes include but are not limited to schools, colleges, government boards including state boards, central boards, ICSE boards, universities awarding degrees to students, training institutes awarding certificates to students and others who register themselves with the system by giving their basic information and uploading required documents to authenticate themselves following which they get a login ID which is password protected to gain access to the system after which they upload the academic data of all their previous and present students onto the system giving details including but not limited to the year of passing, stream of study, result, certificate number and others which are stored and regularly updated after every academic session, in the central server in a properly indexed manner to be synchronized with the employee data for its verification. 15. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 14 wherein educational institutions and certifying institutes upload the format of all their certificates on the system so that an employee, if needs a certified copy of his one or more certificates, can verify with the system and pay a nominal amount of money, which may or may not be shared with the institute or the Government as per mutual agreement, following which he can download a 

 bar coded, certified copy of his required certificates which is accepted as such everywhere. 16. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 1 wherein all police stations register themselves with the system or if that is not possible, the central police commissioner office registers itself with the system by giving their basic details and creating their login ID which is password protected following which they upload and update the data of all the criminal activities recorded in their police station along with mentioning the details of the case and the closure of the case giving all the details which is indexed with the personal identification data of the person and gets stored in the central server and gets synchronized with the employee data when it is entered. 17. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 1 wherein verifying agencies include but are not limited to private investigative services who conduct verification and authentication of people for financial gains wherein such verification agencies register with the system to be allotted work, for which they give their basic details and upload requisite documents which prove their integrity, quality of work, experience, locations, details of their work force and other such parameters which are verified by the system after which the terms and conditions for the verification process are mutually agreed upon to following which they get a login ID which is password protected to gain access to the system. 18. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials as claimed in claim 17 wherein the verifying agencies associated with the system are given the unverified data accumulated from the employees working 

 in the demographic area of the verifying agency which needs to be verified which is downloaded by these agencies and verified from the employee's educational institution or previous employer as per the requirement, following which they upload their report with the system along with marking the certificate details as verified after which the data is synchronized with the employee data and is marked as verified by the verifying agency. 19. The system for providing verified information of employees and certified copies of their verified testimonials substantially herein described with reference to the foregoing description and diagrams.
